message.content:
Subject: Formal Complaint: Delayed and Damaged Delivery – Order #[Order Number]

Dear Customer Support Team,

I am writing to formally lodge a complaint regarding my recent order, #[Order Number], placed on [Date of Order]. I was expecting to receive my package by [Expected Delivery Date]; however, it arrived on [Actual Delivery Date], a delay of two weeks beyond the promised timeframe.

Furthermore, upon opening the package, I discovered that the contents had sustained significant damage during transit. Specifically, [describe the damage in detail, e.g., the outer box was crushed, the item inside was cracked/bent, parts were missing, etc.]. This condition renders the product unusable and does not meet the quality standards I expect from your company.

I have attached photographs of the damaged packaging and the item itself for your reference. I also include a copy of the order confirmation and the shipping label.

Given the inconvenience caused by the excessive delay and the poor condition of the received goods, I request the following resolution:

1. A full refund for the order, including any shipping fees paid.
2. Alternatively, if you prefer to replace the item, I request expedited shipping at no additional cost, along with a partial refund or store credit as compensation for the inconvenience and delay.

I have been a loyal customer of [Company Name] for [Number] years and have always appreciated your service. However, this experience has been deeply disappointing. I trust that you will treat this matter with the urgency and seriousness it deserves.

I look forward to your prompt response within the next 48 hours. Please let me know how you intend to resolve this issue.

Sincerely,

[Your Full Name]  
[Your Phone Number]  
[Your Address]  
Order #[Order Number]  

**Attachments:**  
- Photo of damaged packaging  
- Photo of damaged item
